TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_trom_khoni_truhung, title = trom_khoni_truhung, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/trom_khoni_truhung} }

S.FORM: trom khoni truhung in'yanux Tayal bih llyung Klesan kya ga maki ci inbuyan yow na gaga na pkita kayal kwe, baley ci cnpngan ta p'yugan na kayal hiya ga knahul nya ubuy pkhngyan ro knita krryax. yani maha kwara knba'an ta kwe, skura ita Tayal ga piyang na yow, utux yow ga galan ta gnmilan na s'yanux ta, utux yow lwey ga kahul tkba' ta tgamil yow kwe ro p'aras hi'an na klhangan ta ita Tayal, kwe ga piyang myasa na knba'an, maki knita na cka Tayal hiya, "mita kayal" ro p'yugan na bhuyow kwara khoni, nya pkita maha kba' nya p'yuw kayal kwe, cyoli Tayal ga pgluw p'yuw na kayal kbaley ryax ro kita pntyagan ta. yani nyu sbiru suruw micu: trang mhtuw yani ci beta' llyuw na abow khoni' truhung kwe laga , si ba'iy maha ya kinga masu' sknutan ta misan la, ya kinga tekun tmangu abow uy la, ryax yaca ga aw ci tmubox ta lmyun. iyik k'aring ta tmubox lmyun ga lmon ta pcyus Lutux lmyun ta, spngsa ta Lutux ro sina ta Lutux mwah klahang ro bhuyow knlaxan ta, utux kawas k'aring ta tmubox ga musa t'aring uy la.

trom khoni truhung in'yanux Tayal bih llyung Klesan kya ga maki ci inbuyan yow na gaga na pkita kayal kwe, baley ci cnpngan ta p'yugan na kayal hiya ga knahul nya ubuy pkhngyan ro knita krryax. yani maha kwara knba'an ta kwe, skura ita Tayal ga piyang na yow, utux yow ga galan ta gnmilan na s'yanux ta, utux yow lwey ga kahul tkba' ta tgamil yow kwe ro p'aras hi'an na klhangan ta ita Tayal, kwe ga piyang myasa na knba'an, maki knita na cka Tayal hiya, "mita kayal" ro p'yugan na bhuyow kwara khoni, nya pkita maha kba' nya p'yuw kayal kwe, cyoli Tayal ga pgluw p'yuw na kayal kbaley ryax ro kita pntyagan ta. yani nyu sbiru suruw micu: trang mhtuw yani ci beta' llyuw na abow khoni' truhung kwe laga , si ba'iy maha ya kinga masu' sknutan ta misan la, ya kinga tekun tmangu abow uy la, ryax yaca ga aw ci tmubox ta lmyun. iyik k'aring ta tmubox lmyun ga lmon ta pcyus Lutux lmyun ta, spngsa ta Lutux ro sina ta Lutux mwah klahang ro bhuyow knlaxan ta, utux kawas k'aring ta tmubox ga musa t'aring uy la.
S.PHON: trom kħoni truħuŋ inʔjanux tajal βiħ lljuŋ kles~ɕan kja ɣa maki ʦ~ʨi inβujan jow na ɣaɣa na pkita kajal kwe, βalej ʦ~ʨi ʦ~ʨnpŋan ta pʔjuɣan na kajal ħija ɣa knaħul nja uβuj pkħŋjan ro knita krrjax. jani maħa kwara knβaʔan ta kwe, s~ɕkura ita tajal ɣa pijaŋ na jow, utux jow ɣa ɣalan ta ɣnmilan na s~ɕʔjanux ta, utux jow lwej ɣa kaħul tkβaʔ ta tɣamil jow kwe ro pʔaras~ɕ ħiʔan na klħaŋan ta ita tajal, kwe ɣa pijaŋ mjas~ɕa na knβaʔan, maki knita na ʦ~ʨka tajal ħija, "mita kajal" ro pʔjuɣan na βħujow kwara kħoni, nja pkita maħa kβaʔ nja pʔjuw kajal kwe, ʦ~ʨjoli tajal ɣa pɣluw pʔjuw na kajal kβalej rjax ro kita pntjaɣan ta. jani nju s~ɕβiru s~ɕuruw miʦ~ʨu: traŋ mħtuw jani ʦ~ʨi βetaʔ lljuw na aβow kħoniʔ truħuŋ kwe laɣa , s~ɕi βaʔij maħa ja kiŋa mas~ɕuʔ s~ɕknutan ta mis~ɕan la, ja kiŋa tekun tmaŋu aβow uj la, rjax jaʦ~ʨa ɣa aw ʦ~ʨi tmuβox ta lmjun. ijik kʔariŋ ta tmuβox lmjun ɣa lmon ta pʦ~ʨjus~ɕ lutux lmjun ta, s~ɕpŋs~ɕa ta lutux ro s~ɕina ta lutux mwaħ klaħaŋ ro βħujow knlaxan ta, utux kawas~ɕ kʔariŋ ta tmuβox ɣa mus~ɕa tʔariŋ uj la.
